components.name: ProgressRing
components.notes: Visualizes goal relation and current completion state. Observed in the Summary Dashboard Activity section as node 143:25127.

components.name: MetricCard
components.notes: Displays one trackable metric with value, unit, goal relation, trend, and explanation. Observed in Summary Dashboard activity stats and workout summary rows.

components.name: TrendCard
components.notes: Explains long-term direction without reducing the interface to raw chart display. Observed as the Summary Dashboard Trends Box.

components.name: AwardBadge
components.notes: Turns repeated behavior into visible reward evidence. Observed as award items in the Summary Dashboard Awards section.

components.name: WorkoutItem
components.notes: Represents one completed behavior record in a list or history surface. Observed as repeated workout rows in the Summary Dashboard Workouts section. Minimum runtime validation exists under the reverse surface only.
